text:
昨今のアークスは、所持品の整理を
怠る者が多すぎる！
たるんでいると言わざるを得ん！

自らの所持物すら管理できずに
一体なにが為せるというのか！
勘違いもはなはだしい！

ええい、話している内にも
不安が鎌首をもたげてきた！
君、今すぐやってくるといい！

何を、って、決まっているだろう。
アイテム倉庫でのアイテム整理だ！

さあ、さあ、やってきてくれ！
そう難しいことではないはずだ！
私の不安を払拭してくれ

Bah! Too many whippersnapper ARKS these
days never organize their inventory! Just plum
laziness when ya get down to it!

What can ya possibly hope to accomplish if ya
can't even manage your own inventory!?
There's not a dang thing worse! It's a crime!

Bah! Just thinkin' about it's rustlin' my
jimmies, so I think you'd better
get on and go right this instant!

To do what, you ask? Ain't it obvious?
Go to the Storehouse and get your
inventory under control!

Go on then, git! Nothin' hard about this and it
won't take much of your time. Gimme one less
thing to worry about and get outta here!
